parameters.query:
UPDATE leads
SET
  status = 'paid',
  payment_date = COALESCE($2::timestamp, payment_date, NOW()),
  paid_amount = COALESCE($3::numeric, paid_amount),
  paddle_transaction_id = COALESCE(NULLIF($4, ''), paddle_transaction_id),
  paddle_customer_id = COALESCE(NULLIF($5, ''), paddle_customer_id),
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE email = $1
RETURNING id, name, email, user_profile

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.email,
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.payment_date,
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.paid_amount,
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.transaction_id,
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.customer_id
] }}

parameters.query: UPDATE leads SET program_plan = $1::jsonb, updated_at = NOW() WHERE email = $2 RETURNING id, email

WITH picked AS ( SELECT subject, html FROM email_templates WHERE template_key = $1 AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1 ), fallback AS ( SELECT subject, html FROM email_templates WHERE template_key = 'week_1' AND is_active = TRUE LIMIT 1 ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT subject FROM picked), (SELECT subject FROM fallback), 'Your MDT Week Plan') AS subject, COALESCE((SELECT html FROM picked), (SELECT html FROM fallback), '

Hi {{name}}, your plan is attached.

') AS html

UPDATE leads
SET
  week1_sent_at = NOW(),
  next_send_at = NOW() + interval '7 days',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE email = $1

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $('Build PDF Payload').first().json;
return [{ json: { status: 'ok', message: `Payment verified, week ${data.week_number} generated and sent`, email: data.email, week_number: data.week_number } }];

parameters.query: SELECT id FROM payment_events WHERE event_id = $1 LIMIT 1

INSERT INTO payment_events (event_id, event_type, lead_id, email, transaction_id, raw_payload)
SELECT $1, $2, l.id, $3, $4, $5::jsonb
FROM leads l WHERE l.email = $3
ON CONFLICT (event_id) DO NOTHING

options.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.event_id,
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.event_type,
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.email,
  $('Verify and Parse Paddle').first().json.transaction_id,
  JSON.stringify($('Paddle Webhook').first().json.body || {})
] }}
